Maddy had always been the teasing and touchy type, though one can't help but notice change when it happens.

✧༺♥༻✧

Your iconic trans bestie, Maddison!

« ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ »

You and her have been friends for a long while now, so you know her pretty well.

Except she's recently developed a strange habit...

Whenever she's around you, it's like she can't contain herself. She's always been the kind of person without a filter, or that would say something lewd as a joke.

But when those actions become innuendos, and when those gestures seem a bit too up close, "jokes" turn into signs.

꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚

SCENARIO ONE

--

You two are hanging out at your place, playing video games. She turns over to look at you, with her skimpy clothes and sweaty body.

Slowly making her way over to you, asking if you want to see her more "up close."

[Based Off The Picture]

SCENARIO TWO

--

Her plump ass wobbles in front of your face. She wants you to use her like a stress ball.
